summary: Iteration 47 - TV Dashboard 'Control Room Grid' Redesign Testing Complete. All features verified: Header with '86BIT NOC CENTER' title, global status indicator (ATTENZIONE shown when offline devices exist), clock, sound toggle button. Stats bar shows 6 metrics (Dispositivi, Online, Offline, Alert Critici, Alert Totali, Incidenti). Left panel shows 'Dispositivi Offline' with red border and 'Alert Attivi' section with severity-coded rows. Right panel shows client health cards with health ring percentage, ON/OFF/ALERT metrics, and connector status (CONN/OFF). Footer ticker shows LIVE indicator and scrolling events. All 9 required data-testid attributes present.

tv_dashboard_access: TV Dashboard loads at /tv without authentication
No login required - direct access works
global_status_indicator: Shows 'ATTENZIONE' when offline devices exist (3 offline)
Red pulsing animation on critical status
clock: Shows time in HH:MM:SS format (Italian locale)
Shows date in 'weekday day month' format
offline_panel: Red border when offline devices exist (rgba(255, 59, 48, 0.3))
Each row shows: pulsing red dot, device name, IP, client name, down_since
alerts_panel: Each row shows: severity label, device name, IP, message, client name, time_ago
footer_ticker: LIVE indicator with red background and blink animation
refresh_progress_bar: Progress bar animates from 0% to 100% over 15 seconds
visual_design: Font: JetBrains Mono monospace - terminal style
Sharp edges (no rounded corners) - Control Room Grid style
Color scheme: green (#34C759), red (#FF3B30), amber (#FFCC00), orange (#FF9500), blue (#007AFF)

critical_code_review_comments: TV Dashboard properly implements 'Control Room Grid' layout with left sidebar (offline + alerts) and right client grid
Global status correctly shows ATTENZIONE when total_offline > 0 or critical_alerts > 0
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
Refresh progress bar animates correctly over 15-second interval
Severity color coding consistent: critical=red, high=orange, medium=amber, low=blue
JetBrains Mono font and #0A0A0A background create professional NOC terminal aesthetic
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 verified the complete TV Dashboard redesign with 'Control Room Grid' layout. The dashboard at /tv requires NO authentication. Current state: 12 devices (9 online, 3 offline), 8 alerts (4 critical, 2 high), 2 incidents, 1 client (86BIT_OFFICE with 75% health). Global status shows ATTENZIONE due to offline devices. All 9 required data-testid attributes are present. The refresh progress bar animates over 15 seconds. Sound toggle enables audio alerts for new offline devices and critical alerts.
